note: Top-level merchandise lines beyond core uniforms, used to source cross-sell / upsell rails on the Mumzworld landing page.

productTypes.name: School Uniforms
productTypes.description: School-specific Core / Winter / PE uniform per year level and gender. Primary product.

productTypes.name: Backpacks & Bags
productTypes.description: School bags 12/16/18 inch in multiple colours + generic backpacks. Highest-intent attach item.

productTypes.name: Shoes
productTypes.description: Supplementary shoes category. Empty/seasonal at time of crawl but a live slot.

productTypes.name: Branded Lifestyle (Stanley)
productTypes.description: Branded non-uniform merchandise — currently Stanley drinkware (Quencher tumblers, Ice Flow bottles). Premium AOV booster.

productTypes.name: Stationery (B2B)
productTypes.description: Stationery / B2B supply (Magento category id 32445). Back-to-school list filler.

productTypes.name: Pre-Book Fitting
productTypes.description: External EazyQ appointment system to reserve in-store fitting/collection slots for peak back-to-school.

productTypes.name: Promotions
productTypes.description: Seasonal offers hub (e.g. DSF specials). Surface time-bound discounts.
